rows.source_ref: ro_mwan (forum handle), thread 'Stochastic scalping strategy', Babypips forum, 2025, https://forums.babypips.com/t/stochastic-scalping-strategy/1301055
rows.strategy_name: Dual-TF Stochastic Scalp (M5 bias / M1 trigger)
rows.concept: Multi-timeframe momentum alignment: M5 stochastic above/below its 50 level sets long/short bias while M1 stochastic 80/20 levels time the entry and exit.
rows.eligibility_reason: Standard stochastic indicator, implementable in pure MQL5 on FX M1/M5 (.DWX); entry-direction rule stated, but stochastic settings, exact trigger and stop/exit params must be defined by us.
rows.notes: Thin 4-post thread; only evidence is 6 trades on a $140 account (net +10.67). No stochastic periods, no stop-loss/TP, no session filter given. Post #3 is a broker (Valetax) promo-style reply, not independent confirmation. Generic oscillator scalp, not an uncorrelated return driver.

notes: Extracted via pypdf (Read tool could not render pages; poppler absent).
